title: mosiera buxoides
intro: Mosiera buxoides, also known as Bumelia buxoides or box bumelia, is a deciduous shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects. Its health benefits include reducing fever, relieving coughs and colds, and providing relief from skin conditions. Mosiera buxoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, with the bark and leaves being the most commonly used parts for medicinal purposes.
